data.title: Cooper Companies conducting portfolio review amid strong Q4 earnings; stock up. Q4 EPS: $1.15, up 11% YoY. Sales: $1.065 billion.CEO change in 2026.
data.description: Cooper Companies' stock on NASDAQ (COO) saw an increase after reporting Q4 earnings surpassing expectations and providing positive financial guidance. The company is currently undergoing a comprehensive review of its portfolio, structure, strategy, operations, and capital priorities to streamline operations and create long-term value. This includes exploring potential partnerships, joint ventures, divestitures, mergers, or other transactions. Colleen Jay will take over from Robert Weiss as Chair starting January 2, 2026. Q4 adjusted earnings were $1.15 per share, up 11% YoY, exceeding the consensus of $1.11. Revenue for the medical device company stood at $1.065 billion.

data.title: AlphaTON Capital will discuss their 2026 strategy in AMA on December 11, 2025 at 4:30 PM UTC on X and Telegram Voice Chat.
data.description: Participate in the live "Ask Me Anything" session with AlphaTON's Chief Technology Officer on Thursday, December 11, 2025, at 4:30 PM Coordinated Universal Time. The event will be held on X and Telegram Voice Chat.

data.title: DeFi Development Corp. (Nasdaq: DFDV) announces November 2025 recap, highlighting progress in earnings, partnerships.
data.description: DeFi Development Corp, trading as DFDV on Nasdaq, headquartered in Boca Raton, FL, disclosed its unique treasury strategy centered on acquiring and growing Solana (SOL). The company, groundbreaking as the initial U.S. public firm operating on this strategy, released its November 2025 Business Recap. This report encompasses essential highlights in earnings, capital markets activities, collaborations within the ecosystem, and engagements with institutional entities. For further information, the detailed recap can be accessed at: https://defidevcorp.beehiiv.com/p/nov-2025-recap

data.title: Breaking: Dario Vitale steps down from Versace, leaving behind a legacy after X years with the company. #FashionNews
data.description: According to reports, there has been a significant increase in sales of electric vehicles, with a year-on-year growth of over 50%. The surge in demand has resulted in a record-breaking total of 2.5 million electric vehicles sold globally in the last year. This trend is being driven by the growing focus on sustainability and the transition towards cleaner energy options. The rise in sales is also attributed to government incentives and a wider range of electric vehicle models being made available to consumers. Experts predict that this upward trajectory in electric vehicle sales is likely to continue in the coming years.

data.title: Autocar unveils Smart Battery Cable for refuse trucks to enhance fire safety - latest innovation for severe-duty truck safety.
data.description: Autocar, LLC, a prominent manufacturer of severe-duty vocational trucks, headquartered in Birmingham, Alabama, unveiled its newest safety enhancement on December 5, 2025. The innovative product, known as the Smart Battery Cable, aims to enhance truck safety in severe-duty operations. This breakthrough equipment is set to decrease the risk of accidents and improve overall safety standards in the industry. The Smart Battery Cable promises to reduce the number of incidents related to battery malfunction, providing a cutting-edge solution for drivers and fleet operators.

data.title: Mexico Equity and Income Fund, Inc. (NYSE: MXE) declared $0.2337 per share cash dividend, payable on Dec. 31, 2025.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, an announcement was made by The Mexico Equity and Income Fund, Inc. (NYSE: MXE) regarding a year-end cash dividend. The Fund's Board of Directors declared a dividend of $0.2337 per share on its common stock, to be paid on December 31, 2025. This dividend, derived solely from ordinary income, will be distributed to stockholders recorded on December 16, 2024.

data.title: MLG Capital's David Rodriguez receives MHN Excellence Award in Rising Star category.
data.description: In Brookfield, Wisconsin on December 5, 2025, MLG Capital, a top player in private real estate investments, celebrated David Rodriguez's achievement. As the Vice President, Rodriguez was honored with the 2025 Multi-Housing News (MHN) Excellence Award in the notable Rising Star category.

data.title: Innovative Aerosystems to report Q4 and full-year 2025 results on December 18, 2025, with a 10:00 a.m. ET conference call.
data.description: In Exton, Pennsylvania, Innovative Solutions & Support, Inc., operating as Innovative Aerosystems (NASDAQ: ISSC), is planning to disclose its fourth quarter and full-year 2025 outcomes on Thursday, December 18, 2025, before the market opens. The Company will host a conference call at 10:00 a.m. ET on the same day to analyze the financial results, address recent developments, and engage in a Q&A session. Interested parties can access a webcast of the conference call along with the presentation.

data.title: CoinEx celebrates 8 years of growth and success, highlighting resilience and commitment to users.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, in Hong Kong, CoinEx marked its eighth anniversary in the dynamic industry of cryptocurrency. Reflecting on the past eight years, the journey of CoinEx embodies resilience, discipline, and dedication to its users. Since its inception, CoinEx has navigated the industry landscape with unwavering commitment.

data.title: DUPR and USA Pickleball reach a historic agreement, making DUPR the exclusive rating system for all USAP events.
data.description: Delray Beach, Florida - On December 5, 2025, DUPR (Dynamic Universal Pickleball Rating) and USA Pickleball (USAP) revealed a significant collaboration, designating DUPR as the official and exclusive rating system for all USA Pickleball-owned events. This partnership establishes DUPR as the premier rating system for USAP, influencing a wide range of events and activities.
